title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Gerd as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was incredible. You looked like a head of broccoli sailing gloriously through the air!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That first serving wasn't meant for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take it easy, Luffy-kun... you'll reopen his wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Moron!! Are you trying to kill me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chow down! You won't heal if you don't eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to swallow!! How am I meant to eat lying down? KOFF!! KOFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no, he's choking!! Pass me the soup!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now he's got even more burns...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get him the hell away from me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My bad, I didn't mean to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did he do to piss off the giants this much???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet his promise to Luffy was just a trick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm afraid I wasn't lying about that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You gonna spit it out then?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The deal was that you'd free me from these chains first.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
